title: 桌面精灵
description:
Effortless Outfit ChangesSwitch between professional assistant attire, starry evening gowns, beach swimwear... Diverse styles, defined by you!

Dye SystemSupports dyeing for hairstyles and clothing.

Character InteractionMultiple interactive modes blend emotional companionship with practical features, creating a desktop elf that serves as both an efficiency tool and a virtual partner.

• Basic Interactions 

• Functional Interactions (Use items, Access utilities)

Story QuestsAn immersive gaming experience that lets you delve deeper into your desktop elf world.

Creative Workshop SupportFreely upload/download Mods to enrich your gameplay~

Workshop supports adding/modifying:

• Character models

• Costume textures

• Dialogues, voice lines & animations

• AI Chat

Tap for reactions, converse with emotional intelligence, customize looks to express yourself - This desktop elf is both a task-organizing assistant and an empathetic partner who understands your moods.
description_short: Your Cross-Dimensional Partner! Interact through touch, customize her outfits, and build a unique bond! Design her reactions via the Behavior Editor to craft personalized interactions, deepening your connection as you shape a truly unique companion. Creative Workshop support is now live!
